prompt.description: Message shown to the user explaining what to do.

tab_id.description: Target tab. Defaults to the Agent Window's active tab.

targets.description: Optional components to scroll to + flash-highlight.

timeout_ms.description: Hard upper bound on the wait. Defaults to 300000 (5 min), enforced daemon-side via the generic tool timeout.

title.description: Optional custom title for the help overlay. Falls back to the extension's default localized title when omitted.

HelpTarget.description: One component the user is asked to look at / interact with. Exactly one of `ref` / `selector` should be supplied (mirrors the click/fill convention). When neither matches a live element the overlay still shows the prompt and reports the miss via [`ResolvedTarget`].
